issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' for [Activate: Main] ability, but the condition logic is fundamentally wrong. This is a Main phase activated ability, not a passive trigger based on Leader type.

Condition uses HasCardOnBoard checking for 'Revolutionary Army' type, but the card text states 'If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type' — this should check Leader type, not board presence. Use 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Revolutionary Army'.

First action is TrashFromHand, but card text says 'place 1 card from your trash at the bottom of your deck' — this is the opposite direction. Should be searching/retrieving FROM trash, not sending TO trash.

The activated ability has two separate effects: (1) place card from trash to bottom of deck, AND (2) give up to 1 rested DON to Leader or Character. These are chained incorrectly. The second action should not be conditional on the first.
AttachDon action must target a rested DON card (condition missing). Target scope is correct but missing the 'isRested' filter requirement.

Missing the static +3 cost effect. Card has two separate effects: (1) passive static boost when Leader is Revolutionary Army type, (2) activated ability. Current DSL only captures part of activated ability.
